positive: A highly detailed, stylized celestial flora composition featuring interconnected cosmic vines, glowing crescent moons, and stylized botanicals. The style is a masterful blend of retro engraved etching and modern linocut print, emphasizing clean, thick silhouettes and strong contrast. The composition must be perfectly centered, symmetrical, and ready for seamless placement on apparel. Use a limited, rich color palette: deep midnight indigo, luminous gold foil accents, and crisp ivory white. The elements should feel mystical, symmetrical, and harmonious, resembling vintage astronomical maps crossed with jungle foliage. Print-friendly, vectorial quality, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, watercolor, sketch, modern photography, realistic, messy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, low contrast, poorly rendered, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, grayscale only
